title: Chantier Argent
sources: README.md: Core economic architecture and 'Minecraft Server' philosophy
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District G
database.sql: Ledger implementation within the PostgreSQL memos table
forom-config.ts: Category G (Argent) and Action 3 (Chantier) labels
App.tsx: React 19 / Vite 7 tech stack and Pixel reward logic
resume: The quest 'Chantier Argent' (G3) represents the technical construction site for the community's internal economic infrastructure within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of District G (Argent) and the 'Chantier' action (3), this quest is the heavy-lifting phase where the financial theories of 'Idée' (G0) and the community feedback of 'Échange' (G1) are physically forged into the node's ledger systems. In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), the mission to 'Save human communities and long-term memory' requires more than just words; it demands a functional, transparent engine to manage Pixel (PX) circulation and reward distribution. This is the digital workshop where the code for the treasury and transaction history is written and tested. Technically, every aspect of this economic 'Chantier' is archived in the local PostgreSQL database within the 'memos' table, ensuring that the node's fiscal logic remains sovereign, private, and independent of external financial platforms. The software stack, utilizing the high-performance capabilities of React 19 and Vite 7, renders this economic progress through a spatial 5x5 viewport. This allows the 9 Super-Moderators and the early user base to see exactly how the community’s purchasing power is being structured. Hosting this work locally on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson is a core pillar of our 'Minecraft Server' philosophy, safeguarding the community's economic roadmap from the data-mining and algorithmic manipulation common in centralized systems. Economically, participating in the G3 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, supporting the healthy redistribution of value as the server initiates its internal economy. This incentive structure is vital for encouraging the 'Creator' role (Yellow alignment) to build the tools that will empower the 1209 potential users. For pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, G3 is the coordinate where the specific mechanisms for club funding and resource allocation are formally documented, ensuring continuity as student generations cycle through the node. Once the community reaches Phase 3: The Awakening, these 'Chantier Argent' memos will be among the primary documents ingested by ROM, the local RAG engine. ROM will then act as an automated fiscal sage, providing context-aware guidance to maintain the node's economic health based on these foundational records. Ultimately, G3 transforms abstract financial vision into a permanent, structural reality that secures the node’s fiscal integrity for the decade ahead. This entry is now canonized. Our code is our treasure. Every ledger entry is a seed for our collective survival. Mission secure. Done. Yes.
summary: This quest establishes the formal economic construction site at coordinate G3, where the forom's sovereign ledgers and Pixel circulation tools are developed and archived.
